svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="dma_diagram" name="DMA_Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="2068" dy="852" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="afe" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#fceeed;strokeColor=#b85450;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="模拟前端
(AFE)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="80" x="-50" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="timer" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#fffde6;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="定时器 (Timer)
触发采样" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="140" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adc" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#eef4ff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="ADC模块
(高速模数转换)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="140" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dma" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#f4eefa;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="DMA控制器
(硬件数据搬运)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="100" x="313" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mem_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fillColor=#fafafa;strokeColor=#666666;verticalAlign=top;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;spacingTop=5;" value="SRAM (Ping-Pong 双缓冲)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="150" x="451" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="224KTy0yFs1knhFWr93x-2" edge="1" parent="1" source="dma" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="bufB"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="440" y="280" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="300" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="224KTy0yFs1knhFWr93x-1" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="bufA"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="440" y="260" /> <mxPoint x="440" y="240" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="413" y="260" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bufA" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#ebf5eb;strokeColor=#82b366;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="缓冲区 A (Ping)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="476" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bufB" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#ebf5eb;strokeColor=#82b366;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="缓冲区 B (Pong)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="476" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="224KTy0yFs1knhFWr93x-4" edge="1" parent="1" source="bufB" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="610" y="300" /> <mxPoint x="610" y="280" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="640" y="280" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="224KTy0yFs1knhFWr93x-3" edge="1" parent="1" source="bufA" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="cpu"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="610" y="240" /> <mxPoint x="610" y="255" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cpu" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=#fff5eb;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;" value="微处理器 (CPU)
核心算法处理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="120" x="640" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_timer_adc" edge="1" parent="1" source="timer" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="adc" value="硬件触发"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_in" edge="1" parent="1" source="afe" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;labelPosition=center;verticalLabelPosition=middle;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;horizontal=1;" target="adc" value="调理后模拟信号"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="80" y="270" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_adc_dma" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5;strokeColor=#666666;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;verticalAlign=bottom;" value="DMA请求"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" x="-0.1781" y="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="260" y="271" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="240" y="271" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="313" y="271" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge_dma_cpu_int" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;strokeColor=#666666;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" value="传输半满/完成中断"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" x="-0.0463" y="-1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="363" y="159" /> <mxPoint x="530" y="159" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="159" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="363" y="239" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="700" y="239" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
